context: External stabilization session for Pi runtime pressure. The velocity pressure primitive now detects session/runtime pressure, dirty scope, board size, stale handoff, useful commit age, process age, memory, disk, and host VHDX pressure. Current machine pressure blocks long Pi runs: C: has about 3GB free, with Docker/WSL VHDX artifacts accounting for about 214GB.

Re-run npm run ops:disk:cleanup:dry and npm run pi:dev:pressure after cleanup.
Continue TASK-BUD-1089 with the missing deterministic coverage for dangling-process and ceremony/tool-call pressure once disk pressure is no longer blocking.
Keep release readiness anchored on npm run release:readiness:v0.8.0 before choosing the next P0 lane.
